mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_type = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_type = 1 and member_status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_type = 1 and member_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_type = 1 and member_status = 2
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_type = 1 and member_warning = 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_type = 1 and member_last_login_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
mapper.update:
UPDATE member SET member_status = 2 WHERE member_idx IN
#{member_idx}
mapper.select:
select count(*) from member
member_id LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
member_nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchValue}, '%')
member_warning = #{searchValue}
AND member_type = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE member m INNER JOIN comment c ON m.member_idx = c.member_idx SET member_warning = member_warning + 1 WHERE comment_idx = #{comment_idx}
